assertions.title: First-visit homepage shows all new features together

steps.observed: Homepage loaded successfully

steps.expected: Top nav with logo, search icon, user icon
steps.observed: Top nav present with WCStubHub logo, search icon (Open search), user icon (Go to login)
Banner carousel with Previous/Next buttons and 3 dot indicators visible
5 carousel sections: Popular Events, Football Matches, Live Concerts, Basketball Games, Team Merchandise - each with See All links and multiple cards

steps.expected: Footer with company info and links
steps.observed: Footer with WCStubHub branding, Quick Links (About, Help Center, Contact), Legal (Terms, Privacy, Cookie Policy), Fan Protect Guarantee trust banner
Bottom tab bar with Goods, Football, Basketball, Concert, My tabs
Search icon (Open search button) present in top nav
Zero console errors

steps.action: Click search icon in top nav
steps.observed: Full-screen search overlay opened with trending items (products and events)
9 jersey results appeared (Belgium, Croatia, Mexico, Italy, England, Portugal, USA, Argentina, Brazil Home Jerseys)
Navigated to /products/cmn8elch70006l05v1b3fnkhm - Belgium Home Jersey 2026 detail page loaded

steps.action: Verify nav and footer on detail
steps.observed: Top nav (StubHub logo, search, user icon) and footer present on detail page
Returned to http://localhost:3000/
Zero console errors

steps.action: Tap Phoenix Suns VS Los Angeles Lakers carousel card
steps.observed: Navigated to /events/event-stable-005 - event detail page loaded correctly with event info

steps.expected: Return to homepage at approximate scroll position
steps.observed: Returned to http://localhost:3000/

assertions.title: Guest browsing works across all navigation paths

steps.observed: All 5 carousel sections visible and interactive without login prompt
Search overlay opens, type queries, see results - all without login
Navigated to /football - page loaded with 14+ football events, no login prompt

steps.action: Tap event card from football page
steps.observed: Navigated to /events/event-stable-001 - Jordan VS Argentina detail loaded without login prompt

evidence.network: All pages returned 200 without auth redirects

assertions.title: Existing purchase and listing flows still work

steps.observed: Login successful, redirected to homepage

steps.expected: Detail page with Purchase and For sale buttons
steps.observed: Detail page loaded with both Purchase and For sale buttons visible
Quantity modal opened with spinner (max 2500), then order summary displayed
Confirmation step shown, then 'Purchase Complete! Your tickets have been added to My Tickets' success message

steps.action: Navigate back to event detail, click For sale
steps.observed: Listing modal opened with Quantity and Ask Price fields

steps.action: Set price to $100 -> Next -> Continue -> Confirm Listing
steps.observed: 'Listing Created! Your tickets are now listed for sale' success message displayed

assertions.title: Trust badges and listing intelligence still render

steps.expected: Trust badges and listing intelligence visible
steps.observed: Event detail shows 'Best Value' and 'Verified Listing' badges, Buyer Protection section visible
Product detail shows 'Best Value', 'Verified Listing', 'Verified', 'Buyer Protection' badges, Delivery & Shipping section, and Buyer Protection section - all properly rendered within new layout

steps.expected: Admin login page without public nav/footer
steps.observed: Admin login page rendered with Email/Password fields only - no public top nav or footer visible
Redirected to /admin/dashboard - dashboard loaded with stats cards (2 Users, 30 Products, 42 Events, 2 Orders, 6 Owned Assets, 6 Listings)
Products management page loaded with product list table

steps.action: Verify no public nav/footer on admin pages
steps.observed: Admin pages show only Admin Portal sidebar navigation with Dashboard, Products, Events, Users, Orders, Owned Assets, Listings - no public top nav or footer

assertions.title: All features work at 375px mobile viewport

steps.observed: JavaScript confirms window.innerWidth=375, bodyScrollWidth=375, bodyClientWidth=375
Top nav renders correctly with logo, search icon, and user icon all visible
Carousels scroll horizontally with peek of next card visible. hasHorizontalOverflow=false confirmed
Search overlay covers full viewport with trending items and search input
Footer fully readable with Quick Links, Legal links, and Fan Protect Guarantee banner all legible
Tab bar shows all 5 tabs (Goods, Football, Basketball, Concert, My) readable at 375px

steps.action: Check no horizontal scrollbar on body
steps.observed: bodyScrollWidth (375) === bodyClientWidth (375), no horizontal overflow

assertions.title: No console errors on full interaction flow

steps.observed: Console cleared
Page loaded, no errors
Scrolled down 900px through carousels, no errors
Search overlay opened with trending items, no errors
4 results appeared, tapped 'Norway Team Cap', navigated to detail, no errors
Back to homepage, no errors
Navigated to event detail, no errors
Back to homepage, no errors
Scrolled to bottom of page showing footer, no errors

steps.action: Check console errors after full flow
steps.observed: Zero console errors confirmed - empty error output

summary: Tested 9 assertions: 9 passed, 0 failed. All cross-area flows work correctly. Homepage shows all new features (nav, carousels, footer, tab bar). Search-to-detail and carousel-to-detail flows work end-to-end with back navigation. Guest browsing works across all paths without login prompts. Purchase and listing flows complete successfully without interference from new UI. Trust badges and listing intelligence render correctly. Admin panel is unaffected by public UI changes. All features work at 375px mobile viewport with no horizontal overflow. Zero console errors throughout full interaction flow.
